    Method
    Description
    DoctorAnalysisResult
    DoctorAnalyzer.analyze(DoctorAnalysisRequest request)
    Collects evidence, diagnoses it, and writes portable JSON and Markdown reports.
    DoctorAiAnalysisResult
    DoctorAnalyzer.analyzeWithAi(DoctorAnalysisRequest request, DoctorAiAnalysisRequest aiRequest)
    Runs deterministic analysis first, then optionally appends a separate provider advisory.
